afterSnapshot.name: testFetchWeatherResultError

context.userMessage: Approved. Go ahead with the plan.

rationale: New test to verify fetchWeather returns an error Result (ok: false) instead of throwing when the API returns a non-200 status.
implementation: Use latitude 999 which is out of Open-Meteo's valid range, triggering a 400 from the upstream API. Verify we get { ok: false, error: { code, message } } instead of an exception.
